title: SailPoint Discloses GitHub Repository Hack
rssSummary: SailPoint notified the SEC that hackers exploited a vulnerability in a third-party application to access some of its GitHub repositories.

title: SailPoint GitHub repo hit by third-party cyberattack
rssSummary: SailPoint says GitHub repo breach exposed no customer data or production systems.

title: Identity security firm SailPoint discloses GitHub repository breach
rssSummary: SailPoint disclosed a GitHub repository breach on April 20. The company contained the incident and said no customer data was affected.

title: Critical Unpatched SharePoint Zero-Day Actively Exploited, Breaches 75+ Company Servers
rssSummary: Unpatched Microsoft SharePoint zero-day flaws are being actively exploited, with researchers reporting dozens of on-premises servers compromised worldwide.

title: Microsoft SharePoint zero-day exploited in RCE attacks, no patch available
rssSummary: Critical zero-day vulnerabilities in Microsoft SharePoint (CVE-2025-53770 and CVE-2025-53771) have been actively exploited in RCE attacks against on-premises servers.

title: SharePoint Under Attack: Microsoft Warns of Zero-Day Exploited in the Wild – No Patch Available
rssSummary: Microsoft warned that active attacks are targeting a SharePoint Server zero-day (CVE-2025-53770 / ToolShell) while a security update was still being prepared.
